title: Darbar
subTitle: Aaditya, a high-ranking law enforcement official, sets out to eradicate the city's gangsters. As the events unfold, it becomes clear that his motivations are deeply personal.

title: My Friend Ganesha
subTitle: A young boy feels unnoticed and lonely without his parents' attention. Things take a turn for the better when the maid suggests that the family bring home an idol of Lord Ganesha.

title: Dandupalya 2
subTitle: An investigative journalist, Abhivyakti, reinvestigates the case against the Dandupalya gang. After much toil, she manages to get in touch with the gang members to hear their side of the story.

title: Filler
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Farz
subTitle: A veteran police officer becomes increasingly agitated when his partner is killed in the line of duty. To add to his woes, his daughter falls in love with his new daredevil partner.

title: Sanju
subTitle: Bollywood actor Sanjay Sanju Dutt slogs through the quagmire of personal turmoil, substance abuse, and legal battles to find his way to dizzying heights of success.

title: Kabhi Khushi Kabhie Gham ...
subTitle: Rahul, the adopted older son of a rich couple, is banished by his father when he chooses to marry a middle-class woman. Years later, his younger brother, Rohan, sets out to find him.

title: Maa
subTitle: Circumstances bring a mother and a daughter to a village where girls have been mysteriously vanishing. The mother takes the form of goddess Kali to battle out the curse.

title: Stree 2: Sarkate Ka Aatank
subTitle: When Sarkata, a headless spirit, starts snatching the women of Chanderi away into a petrifying parallel realm, Vicky and his friends must save the day.

title: Mardaani 2
subTitle: A twenty-one-year-old psychopath has an affinity towards raping and murdering young woman. But, a cop, Shivani Shivaji Roy, is on his heels as she tries to bring him to justice.

title: Dangal
subTitle: Mahavir Singh Phogat, a former wrestling champion, dedicates himself to transforming his daughters, Geeta and Babita, into elite wrestlers.

title: Hulchul
subTitle: A man and a woman come from two feuding families and pretend to be in love for revenge. Their plan goes awry when they fall in love and they must work on bringing together their families.

title: Hulchul
subTitle: A man and a woman come from two feuding families and pretend to be in love for revenge. Their plan goes awry when they fall in love and they must work on bringing together their families.

title: Bang Bang
subTitle: A charming diamond thief and his unwitting sidekick embark on a rollercoaster of romance, espionage, and explosive transcontinental battles, proving that love can indeed conquer all.

title: Filler
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: D-16
subTitle: Deepak, a retired police officer, narrates an old murder case of his to his friend's son, explaining how he solved the crime.

title: Badhaai Ho
subTitle: Nakul, a 25-year-old man, is shocked to discover that his mother is pregnant. His struggle to come to terms with the news puts his relationship with his girlfriend in jeopardy.

title: Hungama 2
subTitle: Vani, Aakash's former lover, returns to him and reveals that he is the father of her child. However, things go awry when he rejects her claim and seeks help from his colleague Anjali.

title: Golmaal: Fun Unlimited
subTitle: Friends Gopal, Lucky, Madhav and Laxman often dupe gullible people out of their money. Hilarity ensues when they target a middle-aged couple and simultaneously try wooing their beautiful neighbour.

title: Dashing CM Bharath
subTitle: Oxford graduate Bharat assumes his late father's role as chief minister. He strives to reform a corrupt society, but encounters fierce opposition from adversaries.

title: Sunny Sanskari Ki Tulsi Kumari
subTitle: Heartbroken after their partners, Ananya and Vikram, abandon them to marry each other, Sunny and Tulsi team up to crash the wedding of their former lovers.

title: Son of Sardaar
subTitle: Jaswinder returns to his hometown to sell a piece of land he owns and falls in love with a young woman only to find out later that her family wants him dead.

title: Coolie The Powerhouse
subTitle: Deva, a former gold smuggler, seeks to regain his past glory by reviving his old gang with stolen technology hidden in vintage golden watches, leading to unintended consequences.

title: Pichaikkaran
subTitle: A rich businessman and a poor beggar's lives intersect, showing how money influences their fates as one fights off greedy predators and the other searches for his long-lost sister.

title: Pichaikkaran
subTitle: A rich businessman and a poor beggar's lives intersect, showing how money influences their fates as one fights off greedy predators and the other searches for his long-lost sister.

title: Krishna Aur Kans
subTitle: With his quick wit and valiant strength, Krishna outsmarts and defeats his evil uncle, King Kans, and the legion of demons he unleashes.

title: Jawani Diwani
subTitle: Vijay meets Neeta, the daughter of a Thakur, and falls in love with her. However, things change after he finds out that she has been promised to another man in marriage.

title: L7
subTitle: Arun and Sandhya, a newly married couple, move into a new home to begin their marital life. However, Arun soon realises that his wife is possessed, and he must do whatever it takes to save her.

title: Shiv Aur Sati Ki Mahagatha
subTitle: Shivdas, a devoted doctor and astrologer, overcomes life's challenges through unwavering faith in Lord Shiva, ultimately receiving divine blessings and salvation.

title: Dashing Jigarwala 2
subTitle: When the students of the Travancore Maharaja College start to form gangs and engage in crime and brutal fights, Edward Livingston, an English professor decides to restore order in the campus.

title: M.S. Dhoni: The Untold Story
subTitle: M S Dhoni, a boy from Ranchi, aspires to play cricket for India. Though he initially tries to please his father by working for the Indian Railways, he ultimately decides to chase his dreams.

title: Tiger Nageswara Rao
subTitle: In the 1970s, a daring thief named Tiger Nageswara Rao becomes a legend due to the heists he masterminds and the ingenious ways by which he evades the police.

title: Golmaal Again
subTitle: Five orphan men return to the orphanage they grew up in to attend their mentor's funeral. However, they encounter the ghost of their childhood friend, Khushi, and help her attain salvation.

title: Chennai Express
subTitle: Rahul, a young man, sets out to immerse his late grandfather's ashes at Rameshwaram. However, when he helps Meena, a runaway bride, board a train, he has to face the ire of her criminal family.

title: Aavesham
subTitle: Three boys move into a hostel to pursue engineering, where they clash with seniors. To get revenge, they befriend a gangster.
